seo_title: Runway AI wants to beat Google at AI with video generation
meta_description: AI startup Runway aims to revolutionize world models through video generation, potentially rivaling Google's AI capabilities.
body_html:
Runway AI is betting that video generation can help it beat Google at AI. The startup, which started by helping filmmakers, aims to create world models through this technology.

Key Features of Runway's Video Generation TechnologyText-to-video and video generative AI modelsCommercial applications for generating videos, images, and multimedia contentDeveloped by an American company headquartered in New York CityWhat are World Models?A mental model is an internal representation of external reality, used to anticipate events and shape behavior.Runway's Approach to World ModelsAspectDescriptionAdvantage of being an AI outsiderRunway believes its outsider status is an advantage, not a liability.Focus on video generationThe startup prioritizes video generation as the path to world models.Industry Impact and Job OpportunitiesCreation of new jobs in AI research

and developmentIncreased demand for skilled professionals in AI and machine learningPotential disruption in traditional industries through innovative applications

source.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
source.summary: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.
